patches_self_applied.description: Part 4.6 → Section 4.6 for Registry Framing Audit references
Soften 'in broader MHD models' → 'in the westward-drift advection regime modeled by core-flow MHD'
Strip raw HTML <a> markup (was rendered as escaped text by escapeHtml) — replaced with plain text references
Rewrite TLDR: separate spherical-formula argument from mutual-inconsistency argument; standardize base=smaller discrepancy percentages (5.3%, 6.4%, 12.1%)
Align H_eff to 3,316 km and frequency to 22.6 Hz (per WIN-002 computed value)
Add Q-factor citations: Nickolaenko & Hayakawa, 2002; Sátori et al., 2005
Verb fix: 'only {{CA_DOME}} actually derive their predicted values' → 'only {{CA_DOME}} actually derives its predicted value'
Verb fix: 'reviewed WINs derive their predicted value from dome parameters' → 'reviewed WINs derives its predicted value from dome parameters'

patches_for_human.rationale: href=#part6 points to Predictions tab anchor; Timestamp Error content lives at #timestamp-error
Section 4.2 is Eclipse Analysis; Registry Framing Audit is Section 4.6 per heading in part4.html
